creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi Michael, 

after looking deeper into monitorix, I decide to do the install without the install script. 
Additional I removed the init and stop function from monitorix.pl to prevent damage of 
existing crontabs, instead the user will get an instruction what to do. 

Since it is silly to mange files not located in $PREFIX I moved the directory /var/db/monitorix 
to ${PREFIX}/monitorix. 

It seems you have monitorix already in use, so please look into the changes and make additinal 
suggestions If you think there is something missing. 

You can get a copy of the port here: 
http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/PR_146776_monitorix_rewritten.shar
